title: server crashes when prepare statement has expression like "a>?+1"
poc: create table tt (a int, b int);
key_bug_features: prepare statement with expression causing server crashes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tt (a INT, b INT, c FLOAT, d VARCHAR(50), e DATE);
INSERT INTO tt (a, b, c, d, e) VALUES (1, 2, 3.5, 'test', '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO tt (a, b, c, d, e) VALUES (NULL, 3, 4.5, 'example', NULL);
SELECT * FROM tt WHERE b IN (SELECT a FROM tt WHERE c IS NOT NULL);
